name: x402-bazaar-mcp
description: Pay-per-call Base onchain-safety, wallet-intel & AI tools over x402 — free tier works with zero config.
long_description: MCP server exposing x402 Bazaar's paid Base APIs as agent tools. Every tool works instantly on the free tier (one call per day per service, then a preview). Add a prepaid credit token (buy once with USDC, no wallet in the agent) or a Base wallet private key to unlock unlimited paid calls via x402 micro-payments in USDC. Token safety checks, B20 standard inspection, wallet intelligence, DeFi data and AI reports — no API keys anywhere.

credit_token.title: Prepaid credit token (recommended)
credit_token.description: A credit token (ck_…) from the buy-credits service (one x402 settlement mints it — see https://402.com.tr/agents). Each call debits your prepaid balance — no wallet or signing per call. Leave empty to stay on the free tier.

agent_private_key.title: Agent wallet private key (alternative)
agent_private_key.description: Private key of a Base wallet holding USDC, used locally to sign x402 payments (gasless for the payer). Only used if no credit token is set. Use a dedicated low-balance wallet.

catalog_url.title: Catalog URL
catalog_url.description: Override the x402 Bazaar catalog endpoint (optional).
